description_ja: 3人のAI賢者（ソクラテス・孔子・ブッダ）が議論し、あなたの悩みに対して多角的な視点から回答を導き出すアプリです。
description_en: Three AI sages (Socrates, Confucius, Buddha) deliberate on your questions, providing multi-perspective answers through thoughtful discussion.
keywords_ja: AI,相談,議論,哲学,知恵,賢者,ソクラテス,孔子,ブッダ
review_notes: This app uses AI to simulate philosophical discussions between three historical sages. The discussions are generated by AI and are for entertainment/educational purposes.
